creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Since the upgrade of net/gssdp to version 0.12.2 (that was ports commit
svn r302815 by sunpoet@, cc'ed), building of net/gssdp fails in the
configure stage, error message is:
: checking /usr/local/bin/vapigen is at least version 0.14... no
: configure: error: Vala API Generator 0.14 not found
The ports tree's version of lang/vala is over a year old and sverely
behind upstream.

Fix: This patch upgrades lang/vala and lang/vala-vapigen to version 0.17.5.
Note: internally (in vala's Makefile and therefore directory names etc.
this version is already at 0.18 - but this hasn't raised any concerns
upstream, so I'm not changing that).
Additionally, this fixes net-im/telepathy-glib's pkg-plist and bumps
it's portrevision, as telepathy-glib was putting it's vala-files in the
wrong (vala-versioned) directory, which will change when upgrading vala.

Note 2: net/gssdp needs an additional (unrelated) patch to be buildable,
which I wills end in another PR (right after this one).

In case the mail systems eat this batch, it's available at
http://burggraben.net/hacks/vala_upgrade.diff.gz

How-To-Repeat: build net/gssdp with default options (GTK2=on)
